description_long: This is a slim, rectangular computer keyboard with a low-profile design, featuring a standard array of keys arranged in straight rows. The keys are black with white alphanumeric and function labels, and the surface appears to be made of matte plastic. The keyboard is compact, lacking a separate numeric keypad, and the keys are closely spaced, suggesting a modern, space-saving layout. The top surface is flat, while the sides and bottom are smooth and unadorned. There are no visible cables or wireless receivers attached, and no brand logo is present on the surface. The overall appearance is clean and well-maintained, with no visible signs of wear or damage.
description: A slim, black, low-profile keyboard with white-labeled keys in a compact, modern layout. The surface is matte plastic and the keyboard appears clean and undamaged.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the keyboard and the arrangement of all keys.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the keyboard's slim profile and the close spacing of the keys.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, showing the back edge and the uniformity of the key rows.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, again emphasizing the thinness and compactness of the keyboard.
